title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Join the Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited family as a Financial Analyst in Mysuru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited:
Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited!
